formulas.name: Opening Balance
formulas.notes: Opening balance is the balance as per the cash book on the date when reconciliation is done.
formulas.formula: Opening Balance = Balance as per Cash Book

formulas.name: Bank Balance
formulas.notes: Bank balance is the balance as per the bank statement on the date when reconciliation is done.
formulas.formula: Bank Balance = Balance as per Bank Statement

formulas.name: Dishonoured Cheques
formulas.notes: Dishonoured cheques are the cheques that have been returned unpaid by the bank.
formulas.formula: Dishonoured Cheques = Cheques appearing in Cash Book but not in Bank Statement
formulas.variables: Cheques appearing in Cash Book but not in Bank Statement

formulas.name: Cheques Deposited
formulas.notes: Cheques deposited are the cheques that have been deposited into the bank but have not yet been credited in the cash book.
formulas.formula: Cheques Deposited = Cheques appearing in Bank Statement but not in Cash Book
formulas.variables: Cheques appearing in Bank Statement but not in Cash Book

formulas.name: Interest Received
formulas.notes: Interest received is the interest that has been credited in the bank statement but not in the cash book.
formulas.formula: Interest Received = Interest appearing in Bank Statement but not in Cash Book
formulas.variables: Interest appearing in Bank Statement but not in Cash Book

formulas.name: Interest Paid
formulas.notes: Interest paid is the interest that has been debited in the cash book but not in the bank statement.
formulas.formula: Interest Paid = Interest appearing in Cash Book but not in Bank Statement
formulas.variables: Interest appearing in Cash Book but not in Bank Statement

formulas.name: Bank Reconciliation Statement
formulas.notes: Bank Reconciliation Statement is a statement that shows the difference between the cash book balance and the bank statement balance.
formulas.formula: Bank Reconciliation Statement = Opening Balance + Cheques Deposited + Interest Received - Dishonoured Cheques - Interest Paid
formulas.variables: Opening Balance, Cheques Deposited, Interest Received, Dishonoured Cheques, Interest Paid
